_publications._publicationTitle: Biochemical and structural analyses reveal that the tumor suppressor neurofibromin (NF1) forms a high-affinity dimer.

_contextSnippet: HA-ABCD protein was co-IPed with FLAG-tagged domains as noted. The top two gel sections are lysates purified with anti-FLAG antibodies and probed with antibodies to the HA or FLAG epitopes
details: Successfully used for co-immunoprecipitation experiments with HA-tagged neurofibromin domains
